name: pict-provider-keybindings
description: Pict provider for centralized browser keyboard shortcuts — a registry of keystroke -> function-or-route bindings, each with a name, description, and optional help link. Views register/deregister bindings in their lifecycle; a built-in cheatsheet overlay shows what the keys do. Modern keydown + event.key, a Mod (Cmd/Ctrl) abstraction, key sequences, input/IME guarding, and per-binding disable.
author: steven velozo <steven@velozo.com>
